title: Green Tortelloni With Crispy Breadcrumbs
summary: We've combined La Famiglia Cooked Ham & Mozzarella Tortelloni with a vibrant green sauce in this quick and simple recipe.

ingredients.label: 250g La Famiglia Rana Cooked Ham & Mozzarella Tortelloni
ingredients.name: Tortelloni

method.description: Start by blitzing the croutons to a rough crumb in a food processor or pestle and mortar. Season with salt. Tip into a small frying pan with a dash of olive oil and a sprinkle of salt. Set over a medium heat and toast, stirring regularly until golden brown. Remove from the heat and set aside.

Bring a pan of water to boil, add the spinach and garlic for 1 minute, remove from the water immediately, rinse with cold water and drain well. Add to a blender with crème fraîche, olive oil, lemon juice, and Parmesan. Blitz until completely smooth, then season with salt and pepper.

Bring a large pot of water to the boil, then add in the tortelloni to cook for just 2 mins before draining, save some of the water! Add the green sauce to the pan along with the drained pasta and a slosh of pasta water, then mix well to combine.
Portion into bowls and top with the breadcrumbs and a drizzle of oil.

chefs.name: Jodie Nixon
chefs.summary: Jodie is a recipe writer, Mob food producer, and professional snacker. When she's not recreating all your childhood classics, she's creating delicious veg-forward dishes that'll prove you don't always need meat to have a good time. She's one hell of a talented cook.
